posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Live Webinar: Training Creativity — How AI Learns to See, Imagine, and Create
May 14th | 10:00 AM ET
Hosted in The Grand Hall, MANSION’s marketing community

What if AI could generate visuals that actually feel like your brand?
In this hands-on session, Ilya Mezerowsky, AI Creative & Productivity Advisor at monday.com, will show you how to turn generative AI into a brand-savvy creative partner — from better prompting to training LoRA models that learn your visual language.
You’ll learn:
How to train AI with your brand’s visual identity
What is LoRA and how marketers can use it
Prompting tips that go beyond “make it pretty”
Register now to save your seat.
